title: buceras corniculata
intro: Buceras corniculata, also known as the 'Elephant's Tooth', is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Buceras corniculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Buceras corniculata include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
